And hardware stores ate filled with odd-looking tools with ‘obscure: purposes — perfect R&D stuf * Do horrible things to character sheets, card- board figures, and lead miniatures. Got access to paper shredder’ Want a graphic offscreen PC execution? Take the character sheet atthe tend of the session, then return it tothe player at the next session — a small envelope of paper bits. Feed the sheet to your dog. Got 2 garbage disposal? A washing machine? Or tape it to the underside of a car on a wet or snowy day. The same goes for cardboard and ead miniatures, only moreso. All of those lovely gardening tools in the basement, just sitting around idle 
aaa 
Be Sensitive to Play Style Be sensitive to your players, and know what style of play they prefer and are capable of en- joying We have noticed roughly three styles in Paranoia players. Sometimes players progress slowly ever a period of time from one style 
to another, Because you can play several Paranoia adventures in an evening, sometimes the progression occurs overnight. Some players stick with one style; others bounce around from style to style according to im- 
pulse, Match your style of presentation fo your 
players’ game style if you want to have the most fun and the least frustration. Stage One — Trigger Madness: Expect the in- itial reaction to Paranoia to be a joyous release from the generally solemn and lie-revering, themes of other roleplaying games.
